deferred item GATE-1 (iter 2): jq 1.5 (2015) universal on supported platforms; jq-1.4 host fails CLOSED via the parse guard, never a wrong verdict

phase3_findings.description: pipefail+SIGPIPE: printf|grep -q on a large (>64KB) verdict body nondeterministically reads a REAL marker as no-match -> approved PR wedges at incomplete
'always exits 0 like dismiss-stale-rejections.sh' analogy inaccurate (DSR exits 1/2)
add|map error-attribution imprecise at two sites
truncated-tail JSONL (mid-write crash) shape untested; unrecognized-verdict-token branch untested
ENGINE_ERROR non-canonical truthy tokens; embedded quoted REJECT in fenced block behavior undocumented
test temp files leak on mid-block abort (no trap; matches suite style)
docs/DEVFLOW_SYSTEM_OVERVIEW.md finalize_check bullet lags the new fail-closed semantics

fix_decisions.evidence: observable fail-direction is toward blocking in every arm (an APPROVE read as no-match degrades to incomplete; a REJECT read as no-match falls to the comment fallback carrying the same report or to incomplete) — no path fabricates an approve, so the blast radius is a nondeterministic wedge, not silent corruption; local 200KB reproduction did not trigger (timing-dependent) though the reviewer reproduced at 90KB. Fixed regardless via herestrings + ~100KB canary tests; recorded evaluation, did not auto-demote

fix_decisions.claim_text: non-canonical truthy tokens / embedded quoted REJECT
fix_decisions.evidence: strict-token comparison is the runner-normalized contract (producer validates to exactly true/false); embedded quoted REJECT fails toward blocking by the line-anchored design already pushed back on in iteration 4
matches the surrounding suite's established inline-cleanup style; a trap refactor is a suite-wide concern, not this PR's diff
file untouched by this PR's diff (git blame: pre-existing text); docs alignment is the /devflow:docs pass's responsibility — surfaced in the final report for follow-up

fix_decisions.claim_text: gh/jq stderr discarded on fail-closed arms
fix_decisions.evidence: over-grade shapes 2+3: entire observable impact is breadcrumb wording (which-not-why); every arm fails closed with a specific breadcrumb; single-source silent-failure-hunter, no Phase-2 FAIL; same root cause as iter-2 SH-8, deferred there with evidence — but a blinded shadow re-derived it, so it is surfaced as an unresolved shadow finding rather than silently re-parked

fix_decisions.claim_text: engine_is_error plumbing degrades fail-open to false
fix_decisions.evidence: shapes 2+3: documented deliberate defense-in-depth (header + runner comments name the direction); the deriver's no-verdict-for-HEAD arm is the primary guard and catches the crashed-engine case; truncated-tail behavior is deliberately test-pinned with a breadcrumb

shape 3 (single-source pr-test-analyzer, empirical over-grader per canonical list; no Phase-2 FAIL); the Phase 4.4 producer contract pins the marker to the artifact's FIRST line, and a hypothetical regex tightening fails toward blocking; surfaced as an unresolved shadow finding for follow-up rather than silently parked

phase_2.note: 5 items resolved from accumulated mechanical evidence (3 reused verdicts, 2 from gate evidence)

reflection: fix-delta gate (iteration 5): clean — herestring semantics verified identical (incl. temp-file backing for >pipe-buffer strings, no residual SIGPIPE exposure), fixtures verified under the execve env limit, all new tests non-vacuous

over-grade calibration: the SIGPIPE finding arrived graded Critical (single-source final-pass); recorded technical evaluation calibrated it to Important (every arm fails toward blocking — wedge, not silent corruption); fixed regardless

park-calibration gate clean: no parked finding matched (all deferrals fail-closed/diagnostic-only with recorded evidence; pushbacks cite the documented design; AC11 standing-exemption surfaced as follow-up recommendation, not a mis-grade — it does not defeat this PR's ACs)

shadow (convergence-time) coverage full: 5/5 reviewers (final-pass recovered via the single bounded transient re-dispatch after a session-limit death), 16/16 shadow checklist PASS, zero Phase-2 FAILs, shadow_verdict APPROVE with notes
over-grade calibration gate: all 3 as-emitted new Importants flagged (shapes 2+3) and calibrated to Suggestion with recorded evaluations; none drives a promotion

park-calibration gate: TRIPPED on the shadow-re-raise rule — the blinded shadow re-derived two previously-parked findings (gh/jq stderr observability = iter-2 SH-8; nested-recursion/two-jq-passes/finalize-glue re-derivations) — per the gate these are treated as re-graded and, at the iteration cap, surfaced through the APPROVE WITH UNRESOLVED SHADOW FINDINGS path (never as silent notes): unresolved set = gh/jq-stderr-in-breadcrumbs (SHF-1) + mid-body-marker test pin (SHF-3); the remaining re-raises are re-demoted with evidence (nested recursion = deliberately pinned fail-toward-blocking design; two-jq-passes = pure style, no fail direction; finalize inline glue = structurally unrunnable under run.sh, mitigated by the stdout-contract pin)
post-shadow edit gate: HEAD (c53d502) == shadow reviewed_sha — no unreviewed post-shadow edits

widens-surface guard: I5-6 (out-of-scope skip on lib/test/run.sh trap style) disqualified from the deferrals manifest — the PR diff overlaps that file extensively; I5-7 (docs overview lag) survives (file untouched by the diff); the two claim-quality pushbacks are refutations-with-evidence on code this PR wrote, included in the manifest for the verdict matcher

shadow.trigger: convergence-time (iteration cap reached with tentative non-REJECT verdict)
shadow.transient_retry: devflow:requesting-code-review first dispatch died on a session limit (0 tokens); single bounded re-dispatch returned cleanly — global retry budget spent

phase3_findings.description: gh/jq stderr discarded (2>/dev/null) on the deriver's fail-closed arms — breadcrumbs name WHICH arm, never WHY (401 vs 404 vs rate-limit)
engine_is_error degrades to false on every failure of its own plumbing incl. truncated-tail log (documented deliberate defense-in-depth)
finalize_check has no ::warning:: when the deriver itself crashes (|| true swallows rc)
marker-less-fallback-only REJECT reads as 'incomplete - re-run needed' (documented; messaging accuracy only)
verdict marker on a non-first line of a review body untested (regex-tightening regression would ship green)
finalize_check inline glue untested (accepted posture, re-derived)
null commit_id review untested; AC11 positive-trip untested; runner inline normalization untested (minors)
nested ..|objects false-positive class (re-derived; deliberately pinned); two-jq-passes style (re-derived; deferred); ENGINE_ERROR-before-query accepted cost (confirmed)

comparison.note: the 3 as-emitted Importants each received a recorded severity-calibrated evaluation at the Over-grade calibration gate (see fix_decisions); two are blinded re-derivations of findings already deferred-with-evidence in iterations 1-2
